states.name: Snow White
states.title: Snow Maiden of Black & White
states.description: Light and shadow — Snow White and Snow Black. The soul of the shadow had begun to sense her own existence gradually fading away. This was because of emotions that had unexpectedly taken root within her, born from her interactions with the hero and Snow White.

states.name: Snow White
states.title: Snow Maiden of Black & White
states.description: As though exploiting the opening left in her heart, the "other shadow" that was supposed to have been sealed away returns to life once more. She is the black witch, steeped in malice and hatred — the one who was vanquished by Snow Black after attempting to steal her body.

states.name: Snow White
states.title: Snow Maiden of Black & White
states.description:
In the depths of darkness, Snow White and Snow Black joined hands. It was but a fleeting alliance — light and shadow were never meant to intertwine, for darkness is fated to be erased by the light. And yet, Snow Black did not disappear.
Without realizing it, she had already crossed the boundary into the light.
